Localization.value: Add link from {nodeFrom} to {nodeTo}. Is directed? {isDirected}
Invert and update potentials of Link from {variableFrom} to {variableTo}
Invert link from {variableFrom} to {variableTo}
Orient link from {variableFrom} to {variableTo}. Is directed? {isDirected}
Remove link from {variableFrom} to {variableTo}. Is directed? {isDirected}
Absorb node {absorbedNode}
Absorb parents {node}
Add node for {variable} of type {nodeType}
Add potential {potential}
Compound orient links:\n{orientLinkEdits}
Compound remove node for node {node}
Change network type from {currentNetworkType} to {newNetworkType}
Change cycle from {oldTemporalUnit} to {newTemporalUnit}
Change decision criteria {modifiedCriterion} with action {stateAction}. New name is {newName}
Change unit from {oldUnit} to {newUnit} for decision criteria {criterion}
Edit ICI Potential {potential} for {variable}
Change default states from {currentDefaultStates} to {newDefaultStates}
Change always observed from {lastAlwaysObserved} to {newAlwaysObserved} for {node}
Change node name of {node} from {previousName} to {newName}
Replace states of {node} from {lastStates} to {newStates}
Edit state for {node} with action {stateAction}
Change potential for {node} from {oldPotential} to {newPotential}
Change precision of {node} from {lastPrecision} to {newPrecision}
Change purpose of {node} from {lastPurpose} to {newPurpose}
Change relevance of {node} from {lastRelevance} to {newRelevance}
Remove node {node}
Remove node {node}
Remove policy of node {node}. Previous policy was {oldPotential}
Remove potentials: {potentialsToDelete}
Add or remove revealing state {newState} from link {link}. If it is add, this text should show true: {selected}
Change potential for {node} from {lastPotential} to {newPotential}
Change potential variables of {node} from {oldVariables} to {newVariables}
Change temporal options from {oldTemporalOptions} to {newTemporalOptions}
Change time slice for {variable} from {lastTimeSlice} to {newTimeSlice};
Change uncertain values for {node}
Remove uncertain values for {node}
Change units for {node} from {lastUnit} to {newUnit}
Change (network's) variable constraint from {lastConstraint} to {newVariableTypeConstraint}
Change variable type from {currentType} to {newType} for {node}
All the values are 0.0 in potential {potential}
Could not met the constraint: {constraint}
Always observed variable {alwaysObservedNode} is a descendant of decision node {decisionNode}.
Cannot add link from {parentVariable} to {childVariable}, as {childVariable} belongs to a previous time slice.
Node {child} cannot be a child of utility parent: {utilityNode}.
Cannot link a node to itself (In this case, the node {node}).
Criterion name {name} is already present, so it cannot be used for {criterion}.
Criterion name cannot be empty for {criterion}.
There is both a directed and an undirected link from {node1} to {node2}.
There is a link from {from} to {to}.

Node {child} must have parents that are only be utility nodes, or chance or decision nodes, but it has parents that belong to both:\nChance/Decision nodes: {chanceOrDecisionNodes}\nUtility nodes: {utilityNodes}.
Node {child} cannot be child of {parent}, as parents can only be utility nodes, or chance or decision nodes.
Model doesn't allow adding links, meaning it is impossible to add one from {from} to {to}.
Model doesn't allow inverting links, meaning it is impossible to invert link from {from} to {to}.
Model doesn't allow removing links, meaning it is imposible to remove link from {from} to {to}.
Multiple constraints have been violated:
Cannot use an empty name of state in node {node}.
Name of variable {variable} cannot be empty.
Name of variable {variableName} already belongs to another variable.
Network {probNet} must have at least one utility node.
Node {node} cannot be a super value node.
Node {node} already has {parentsSize} parents. No more can be added.
Node {child} has {numParents} parents, but only {maxNumOfParentsAllowed} are allowed.
Node {node} has repeated links.
There should be the same amount of potentials as utilities nodes, but there is {numUtilityNodes} utility node(s) and {numUtilityPotentials} potential(s).
Variable {variable} must be atemporal.
Node for {variable} must be a chance node.
Variable {variable} must be continuous.
Node {node} must have only directed links to other nodes. But it has undirected links to nodes: {siblings}.
Variable {variable} must be discrete.
Variable {variable} must be finite.
Variable {variable} must be numeric.
Variable {variable} must have one and a single one agent.
Network {probNet} must have only one agent.
Variable {variable} must be temporal.
Node {node} must have only undirected links to other nodes, but it has directed links to children nodes: {children}.
Node {node} must have only undirected links to other nodes, but it has directed links to parent nodes: {parents}.
State {newState} already exists in node {node}.
State {stateName} is duplicated in node {node}.
There is a cycle traversing between {parent} and {child}.
There is a loop traversing between {node1} and {node2}.
Utility node {utilityNode} has no potentials, and at least one is required.
Variable {variable} has no potentials.
There is already a variable named {name} in the network.
There are {partitions.size} partitions and {probabilities.size}, while they should both be the same
Potentials should be of the same type, while first potential is {firstPotential.getClass.getName} and the second if {secondPotential.getClass.getName}
There are {costs.size} costs, {effectivities.size} effectivities and {strategyTrees.size} interventions, while they should both be the same
There are {costs.size} costs and {thresholds.size} thresholds, while there should be one threshold less than costs
Cannot invert link from {from} to {to} of {probNet} due to {unsatisfiedConstraint}
Can not remove potential: {oldPotential} of {probNet}
No node is selected, try selecting a node from the {probNet}
Dataset from {source} is empty.
The new evidence {newFinding} is not compatible with an old evidente: {oldFinding}
The variable {variable.getName} has no state {state}, so this finding cannot be translated.
Samples weigth is zero
The total number of subintervals or time horizon is not even.
The total number of subintervals or time horizon is not multiple of three.
{probNet} is not of an allowed type: {allowedTypes}
{probNet} cannot be converted to {newNetworkType} as it would not satisfy constraints: {unsatisfiedConstraints}
{probNet} has no nodes.
Cannot evaluate '{elementToEvaluate}' due to {evaluationException.getMessage}
An expression cannot be resolved as there is no value resolved for variable {reference}
There is required evidence to be present in variable {timeVariable}, but there is no evidence
Variable {variable} cannot be found in evidence case {evidenceCase}
Potential {potential} cannot be converted to a table
Potential {potential} cannot be converted to a table due to variable {variable.getName()} being a {variable.getVariableType()} variable
Potential {potential} must be sum or product
There was no top variable value was not within any domain (Domains: {branches})
Since there is the conditioning decision node {conditioningDecision}, the following nodes should have policies:\n{this.nodesWithoutPolicy}
This algorithm cannot evaluate {probNet}, as it can only evaluate networks of type: {possibleNetworkTypes}.
This algorithm cannot evaluate {probNet} because it does not satisfy the following constraints: {unsatisfiedConstraints}
Variable {variable} is not temporal.
File {url} is not well-formed.\nAn error occurred at line {saxParseException.getLineNumber}, column {saxParseException.getColumnNumber}: {saxParseException.getMessage}.
Cannot open file {filename}.
Unexpected error when validating {url}\n{originException.getMessage}.
Could not read a constraint.
Expected token {expected}, but found {found}
Potential {potential} does not exist.
No ProbNet in ProbNetInfo.
Variable {variableName} is missing properties: {missingProperties}.
Token {token} is missing;
Variable {variableName} is missing.
You have requested to open {amountOfInputsRequested} files, but only 1 is allowed.
Invalid PGMX Structure due to: {message}.
Network type is missing.
Cannot recognize network type {networkType}.
There are {subPotentials.size} not linked no an ICIPotential ({subPotentials}).
There was expected to find {expectedLength} states in variable {variableName}, but {actualLength} were found.
Version {version} is not supported.
Can not parse XML {netName} document due to: {originException.getMessage}.
Found {variable.getNumStates} states in variable {variable.getName}, but there are {potentials.size} instead of {variable.getNumStates}.
Node {node} has no potentials, while at least one is expected.
There is more than one conditioning variables in the potential table ({tablePotential.getNumVariables} variables).
Can not create file {filename}.
ICI Model {modelType} is not supported by Elvira.
Tried to write a null Probabilistic Network
There is no name for {probNet}.
Network type {networkType} is unknown, only it is allowed to use network types: {allowedTypes}.
{multicriteriaType} criteria with unit {mainUnit}. unicriterion showed? {unicriterionOptionsShowed}. CE Showed= {ceOptionsShowed}.
{transition} temporal option with horizon {horizon}
There is no reader for file format {extension}
There is no writer for file format {extension}
There is no reader for files of extension {fileExtension} in version {fileVersion}.\nThis happened trying to read the file located at {url}.
Labelled link from {from} to {to}
Link from {from} to {to}
{ceCriterion} criterion named {criterionName}
Cycle length of {value} {unit}(s)
Evidence case with findings {findings}
Finding of variable {variable} with numerical value {numericalValue} and state index {stateIndex}
{nodeType} node of {variable}
Interval with limits: {limits}
{networkType} network named {metadata.name}
Localization.long: {networkType} network named {metadata.name} with {this.getNumPotentials} potentials, {this.getNodes.size} nodes, {this.constraints.size} constraints
Localization.verbose: {networkType} network named {name} with {this.getNumPotentials} potentials, nodes {this.getNodes}, constraints {this.constraints}, and agents {this.agents}

Localization.value: state {name}
{string} (Properties: {properties})
{variableType} variable {name} with states {states}
Chance variable without potential
No equal links allowed.
Variables have distinct names
All nodes contain no more than {maxNumParents} parents.
Tried to add, remove or invert the wrong link
Always-observed variable are not descendant of a decision nodes
Links can only be drawn to future slices or from nodes in slice 0 towards atemporal nodes
No cycles paths are allowed.
Names aren't empty
Links must have no restrictions
No event nodes allowed
There must be only one Initial Event with no parent
Self loops only allowed in event nodes
There must be no loops
Utility nodes can not have mixed parents.
No multiple links are allowed.
There are no revelation arcs
No self loops are allowed
Super values must not be present in nodes
Utility nodes only can have utility children
All variables must be atemporal.
Only chance nodes are allowed
All variables must be continuous
Only directed links allowed
All variables must be discrete
All chance and decision variables must be finite state or discrete
All variables must be purely numeric.
There can be no more than one agent
There must be only one utility node
All variables must be temporal.
No directed links allowed
Links must be unlabeled
Utility variables must have utility potentials and there must be at least one utility potential
All nodes must be utility potentials
All criterions must have a different name, and no criterion can have no name
Variable names must not be empty and it two variables cannot have the same name
All state have names and two states cannot have the same name
All states must have a different name, and no state can have no name
threshold of limit {limit}
TreeADDBranch for {rootVariable} with potential {potential} and states {states}
Decision analysis
Dynamic Bayesian
Dynamic LIMID
Influence diagram
Markov Influence Diagram
Markov Dynamic Bayesian
The clone method of {cloneableClass.getName} is badly implemented, as it returns the original object
There is no network selected to use as model, and one is required.
Algorithm {algorithmType.name} does not support unobserved variables, which are: {unobservedVariables}
